dc:title: Touring bicycle beside a rural road
dc:description: A paved two-lane road extends from the foreground into the distance through a dry rural landscape. A loaded bicycle with bags is parked at the left shoulder, leaning against a metal guardrail in front of a concrete retaining wall. White road-edge and center markings define the roadway. Vegetation lines both sides, with fence posts and open fields to the right and low hills or mountains visible on the horizon beneath a mostly clear sky. No people are visible.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
